title: New Year Honours 2026: Army Commendations and Awards
description: The Army has awarded some of its outstanding personnel, civil servants and contractors with a selection of commendations and medals including the Meritorious Service Medal, Chief of the General Staff Commendation, and Army 3 Star Commendations.
text:
Following the release of the Military Division of the New Year Honours List 2026, the Army has awarded some of its outstanding personnel, civil servants and contractors with a selection of commendations and medals including the Meritorious Service Medal, Chief of the General Staff Commendation, and Army 3 Star Commendations, as follows:
